creator: wblock@wonkity.com
text:
Debug messages like "no toe capability on 0xc44d1800" appear frequently in /var/log/messages.

These were removed from tcp_offload.c as of v1.2:

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/src/sys/netinet/tcp_offload.c.diff?r1=1.1;r2=1.2

But have reappeared in 1.4.2.1:

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/src/sys/netinet/tcp_offload.c.diff?r1=1.4;r2=1.4.2.1

How-To-Repeat: Check /var/log/messages:

Jul 31 08:32:25 speedy kernel: no toe capability on 0xc44d1800
Jul 31 08:34:05 speedy kernel: no toe capability on 0xc44d1800
Jul 31 08:34:10 speedy kernel: no toe capability on 0xc44d1800
Jul 31 08:46:23 speedy last message repeated 111 times
